description: Michael Cho, co-founder of FrodoBots, discusses their project at Breakpoint 2024, focusing on the intersection of robotics and gaming. They introduce 'Earth Rovers', a browser-based game allowing players to control real robots remotely. The game incorporates a scavenger hunt mode with NFTs and aims to advance AI through real-world data collection. They also announce an upcoming Earth Rover challenge in Abu Dhabi, collaborating with top AI researchers.
topic_summary: At [t=0:05], Michael Cho introduces FrodoBots and their gaming project. By [t=0:23], he describes 'Earth Rovers', a game where players control robots in real life. The game includes a scavenger hunt mode for NFTs, announced at [t=1:30]. They highlight their AI data set and upcoming competition in Abu Dhabi at [t=2:50].
